title: Business Development & Marketing Intern
description:
SISTIC is Singapore’s leading ticketing technology company, powering experiences that connect people to the arts, entertainment, and sports they love. SISTIC is entering a new growth phase - including a strategic partnership with AXS.com, the global ticketing arm of the US-based Anschutz Entertainment Group (AEG). This partnership strengthens our capabilities in technology, data, and international partnerships, while keeping SISTIC rooted in our mission: supporting creators, promoters, and live experiences across Singapore and the region.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Play an active role in supporting the Business Development & Marketing team in the planning, development and execution of marketing plans/ activities, advertising and communications programmes for our arts & culture, sports & entertainment, esports and MICE clients 
  • Support the team in growing and amplifying the SISTIC brand organically via channels including website, mobile app, search and social media 
  • Research and work with Head of BD to prepare compelling business development collaterals  
  • Explore new channels for advertising & promotion and partnership opportunities 
  • Track and evaluate the effectiveness of all marketing initiatives or campaigns and proactively roll out test plans to improve campaign performance 

Job Requirements:  

  • Able to start in Feb 2026
  • Pro-active, eloquent with good verbal and written communication skills 
  • Aptitude in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint  
  • Experience in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator preferred 
  • Ability to think creatively and spontaneously 
  • Analytical, detail-oriented and meticulous 
  • Energetic and proactive 
  • Interest in arts & culture, sports & entertainment, esports and MICE industry 
  • Interest in digital marketing and analytics preferred 
  • Special note to student : e.g able to work on non-standard working hours for hot events if required

postedCompany.description:
Connecting People to entertainment
SISTIC is the ticketing service and solution provider behind more than 1000 events every year. The leading provider in Singapore, it sells tickets to events ranging from pop concerts, to musicals, theatre, family entertainment and sports.

Readily accessible, ticket buyers can browse for and buy tickets through the SISTIC website, customer hotline +65 6348 5555 and mobile app. Additionally, more than 40 SISTIC Authorised Agents are located throughout Singapore, and also in Malaysia, Indonesia, Taiwan and Vietnam.

SISTIC also offers STiX, a web-based and customer-oriented ticketing solution suitable for ticketing companies, event promoters and venues, under a licensing arrangement. STiX is being used for events held at various performance venues in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Hong Kong and Macau.

SISTIC has been providing innovative ticketing services since December 1991 and licensing its ticketing solution STiX since 2003.
postedCompany.name: SISTIC.COM PTE LTD

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
